ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., Premier League) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the league within the sport hierarchy */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the league (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Leicester City) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "home_colors" TEXT /* Home kit colors */,
  "away_colors" TEXT /* Away kit colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team's manager */,
  "away_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league for this standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team for this standing */,
  "standing_season" INTEGER /* Season for the standing */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the standing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Season year for the statistics */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "penalty_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored from penalties */,
  "penalty_missed" INTEGER /* Penalties missed */,
  "freekick_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored from free kicks */,
  "freekick_attempted" INTEGER /* Free kicks attempted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the engagement metrics */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement metrics */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the engagement metrics */,
  "social_media_followers" INTEGER /* Number of social media followers */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the season */,
  "merchandise_sales" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from merchandise sales */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance for the team's matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  "coach_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match that will be played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the match */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Scheduled kickoff time of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Home team in the fixture */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Away team in the fixture */,
  "fixture_status" TEXT /* Status of the fixture (e.g., upcoming, played, postponed) */,
  "tv_broadcast" TEXT /* TV channels broadcasting the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odds entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match for which the odds are set */,
  "odds_source" TEXT /* Source of the betting odds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the odds were last updated */,
  "team_1_odds" REAL /* Odds for team 1 winning */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "team_2_odds" REAL /* Odds for team 2 winning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., registered, unregistered) */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
